definition: Relinquishment or release by letting go.
notes: Use relinquishment as the default because it fits doctrinal prose cleanly while keeping the practical letting-go force audible. Letting go remains acceptable in direct practice prose. Keep vossagga distinct from mere abandoning, from virāga as fading, and from nirodha as quenching.

context_rules.notes: Allowed alternate when the line is plainly practical.

version_notes: Upgraded from a draft placeholder so the repository can distinguish relinquishment from abandoning and quenching.
